name: Dos Playa
description: 'Two beaches' inside Arikok — sea turtle nests occasionally found; walk carefully.

rockiness.beach: White sand in two wild coves inside Arikok National Park 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Rocky surf zone — no safe wading

characteristics.depth_profile: Two connected wild coves with surf zone only — no safe wading depth for casual swimmers.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Rocky coves within Arikok National Park
characteristics.access: 4x4 or hike; Arikok National Park entrance fee
fun_facts: 'Two beaches' inside Arikok — sea turtle nests occasionally found; walk carefully.
safety_notes: Swimming not recommended; experienced surfers only in surf zone.
